Header file for initializing and using a getline function in the Zephyr environment.

# Purpose
This code is a simple C header file that declares two functions related to line input handling. The function [`zephyr_getline_init`](<#zephyr_getline_init>) is likely intended to initialize any necessary resources or state before using the line input functionality. The function [`zephyr_getline`](<#zephyr_getline>) is designed to read a line of input and return it as a character pointer. These declarations suggest that the implementation of these functions is located elsewhere, and this header file provides the necessary interface for other parts of the program to use these functions.
# Function Declarations (Public API)

---
### zephyr\_getline\_init<!-- {{#callable_declaration:zephyr_getline_init}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../../src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/targets/zephyr/src/getline-zephyr.h#L16>)

Initializes the line buffer system for UART input handling.
- **Description**: Use this function to set up the necessary queues and buffers for handling UART input. It initializes two FIFO queues: one for storing used buffers and another for free buffers. This function must be called before any UART input operations to ensure that the system is ready to process incoming data. It prepares the environment for the UART handler to manage input efficiently.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: None
- **See Also**: [`zephyr_getline_init`](<getline-zephyr.c.md#zephyr_getline_init>)  (Implementation)


---
### zephyr\_getline<!-- {{#callable_declaration:zephyr_getline}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../../src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/targets/zephyr/src/getline-zephyr.h#L17>)

Retrieves a line of input from the UART console.
- **Description**: Use this function to get a line of input from the UART console after initialization with `zephyr_getline_init`. It waits indefinitely for input to become available and returns a pointer to a static buffer containing the line. The function manages the recycling of input buffers internally, so the caller does not need to free the returned buffer. Ensure that the system is properly initialized before calling this function to avoid undefined behavior.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: Returns a pointer to a static buffer containing the line of input. The buffer is managed internally and should not be freed by the caller.
- **See Also**: [`zephyr_getline`](<getline-zephyr.c.md#zephyr_getline>)  (Implementation)
